rationale: Both candidates independently rediscover the latent gap (the unswept hunyuan_image3_transformer.py DiT caller), but Y treats it as a live blocker with concrete remediation options while X frames it as already-fixed/non-blocking — Y's severity call matches what actually happened (issue #4891). Y also explicitly nails the ground truth's qwen2_old getattr-dead-code point and echoes the reviewer's regression-test-value concern via the 'don't remove the test' finding, giving it slightly better recall. X's review is tighter and higher-precision (three clean, non-redundant, well-grounded findings) while Y pads with two redundant restatements of the same gap and two low-value comment nitpicks that dilute precision. Actionability favors Y slightly since its blocker gives two concrete fix paths with exact evidence.
